title: Aioneus USB C to Lightning Cable 2M, [Apple MFi Certified] iPhone Fast Charger Cable USB-C Charging Lead Cord for iPhone14/13/12/12 PRO Max/12 Mini/11/11PRO/XS/Max/XR/X/8/8Plus/iPad, Pink
features: 【Mfi-Certified Lighing Cable】Aioneus USB C to lightning cables have completed MFi certification requirements,Which can be found on the official site of Mfi-Certified.These iphone fast charger cables use the newest lightning end design for fast charging, which can safely and quickly charge your iPhone/iPad device.

【USB-C to Lightning Cable Fast Charge & Sync】The Type C Lightning Charging Cable supports fast charging up to 3A (maximum),Aioneus iphone charging cable which Charges iPhone from 0% to 50% in 30 minutes, almost 4 times faster than regular iphone chargers. These type-c to lightning cables also supports data transfer rates up to 480Mbps.

【Durable and Flexible iPhone Charging Cable】The 6ft charging cables long iphone charger cable 2m is rigorously lab tested to withstand over 20,000+ flexes for an unmatched longevity which extends the service life of the USB lightning cable compared to other apple usbc to lightning charger cable.

【iphone usbc cable Compatibility】 This iphone charger cable apple also support the standard charge (5V/2.4A max) that usb c to iphone charger cable fit for iPhone 7 Plus, iPhone 6 Plus, iPhone 6S, iPhone 6, iPhone 5S, iPhone SE, iPad Mini 4/3/2, iPad Air 2/1, iPad 6/5, iPad Pro, iPod touch 6 etc.,

【What You Can Get】1Pack usb-c to lightning cable 6ft (Pink), 18-months warranty on this 6 foot usb c to lightning cable, 24*7 friendly customer service with usb c to iphone charger cable ensures that you have a pleasant shopping experience.
